name: Agent Collaboration
description: Supervised two-agent collaboration in Discord threads with deterministic child runs and cleanup.

maxTurns.description: Default maximum total turns per collaboration.

turnDelayMs.description: Delay between turns and the human interjection poll window.

discordAccountId.description: Discord account to use for thread and webhook operations. Omit to use the configured default.

webhookNamePrefix.description: Prefix used when creating a fresh webhook for each collaboration.

relay.description: Cross-gateway relay configuration for routing collaboration turns to agents on remote gateways.

port.description: Local port the target gateway listens on.

token.description: Gateway auth token for the target.

agents.description: Agent IDs hosted on this gateway.

maxTurns.label: Default Max Turns
maxTurns.help: Upper bound for total turns before the collaboration stops.

turnTimeoutSeconds.label: Turn Timeout Seconds
turnTimeoutSeconds.help: Timeout passed to child-run wait calls.

turnDelayMs.label: Turn Delay Milliseconds
turnDelayMs.help: Also doubles as the human interjection collection window.

threadAutoArchiveMinutes.label: Thread Auto Archive
threadAutoArchiveMinutes.help: Discord-supported archive duration for collaboration threads.

webhookNamePrefix.label: Webhook Name Prefix
webhookNamePrefix.help: Each collaboration creates a fresh webhook using this prefix.

relay.label: Relay Configuration
relay.help: Configure cross-gateway agent routing for collaborations involving agents on different OpenClaw instances.
